segments.note: Continuous fan/swap already in motion at window start: cards held high and shuffled, collapsing into one shown card. One flowing segment, ends as the card lowers before the next slide-up.
Card A (purple/white player base/refractor) slides up from bottom and is held centered, readable.
Card B (orange/white player) slides up and is held centered, readable; capped at ~2.5s (static over-hold after this trimmed).
GLORY gold insert (feature/hit) slides up and is held centered; given the longer feature hold. Held even longer on tape but trimmed to cap.
Card C (white/silver player) slides up and is held centered, readable. After this the mat goes to sorting/empty/pack-handling dead time through end of window.
